_note: REPRESENTATIVE synthetic cost data — order-of-magnitude figures modelled on typical Indian data-centre EPC BOQ line items and standard-form (e.g. FIDIC-style) liquidated-damages rates, NOT any real project's actual costs or contract terms. Used only to make the cost-at-risk FORMULA in app/cost_risk.py demonstrable end-to-end; the formula and the live inputs it multiplies (project_impact_days, cost_premium_pct, open-NCR count) are real computed values, not invented. See README 'What's REAL vs REPRESENTATIVE'.
